home.title: WHO IS
home.subtitle: Trust no one. Question everything. Find the infiltrator before they reveal your location.
home.playWithFriendsDesc: Create a room and invite your squad for local or remote play.
home.rulesHowToPlayDesc: New recruit? Learn the basics of espionage and deduction.

rules.title: HOW TO PLAY
rules.subtitle: Master the art of deception and deduction
rules.overviewText: Who Is Spy is a social deduction game where players receive secret keywords. Most players get the same word (civilians), but some get a different word (spies). The goal is to find the spies through discussion without revealing your own word.
rules.setup1: Add at least 3 players to start the game
rules.setup2: Configure the number of spies (must be less than civilians)
rules.setup3: Optionally add blank cards for advanced gameplay
rules.setup4: Choose or randomly select a keyword pair
rules.civilianDesc: Receives the majority keyword. Goal: Find and eliminate all spies through discussion and voting.
rules.spyDesc: Receives a different keyword. Goal: Blend in with civilians and avoid detection. Spies win if they equal or outnumber civilians.
rules.blankDesc: Receives NO keyword. Goal: Listen carefully and guess the civilian word when eliminated. Wins alone if guess is correct!
rules.gameplay1Desc: Each player secretly views their keyword by tapping their card
rules.gameplay2Desc: Players take turns describing their word without being too obvious
rules.gameplay3Desc: After discussion, vote to eliminate a suspected spy
rules.gameplay4Desc: If a blank player is eliminated, they can guess the civilian word to win
rules.blankWinsDesc: Blank player correctly guesses the civilian word when eliminated (solo victory!)
rules.tip1: As a civilian, be specific enough to prove you know the word, but vague enough not to help spies
rules.tip2: As a spy, listen carefully to others' descriptions and try to blend in
rules.tip3: As a blank, gather clues from everyone to make an educated guess
rules.tip4: Pay attention to hesitation, vague answers, or suspicious behavior

manageGroups.title: PLAYER GROUPS
manageGroups.subtitle: Create or load saved player groups
manageGroups.noSavedGroupsDesc: Create and save your first player group to quickly start games with the same people.
manageGroups.minPlayersError: You need at least 3 players to continue

gameConfig.title: Configure Roles
gameConfig.validationError: Spies must be less than civilians!

importKeywords.title: SELECT KEYWORDS
importKeywords.subtitle: Choose a keyword pair for this game

roleDistribution.title: ROLE DISTRIBUTION
roleDistribution.subtitle: Each player will see their secret role
roleDistribution.allRevealed: All players have seen their roles

roleReveal.rememberKeyword: Remember your keyword. Try to figure out who has a different word without revealing yours!
roleReveal.strategyDesc: Describe your word carefully without being too obvious.
roleReveal.cautionDesc: Listen carefully to what others say about their words.
roleReveal.closePrivatelyDesc: Make sure no one else sees your keyword before closing this screen.

discussion.title: DISCUSSION & VOTING
discussion.subtitle: Discuss and vote to eliminate a suspected spy
discussion.blankGuessSubtitle: Guess the civilian word to win!
